metadata.description: Update arxiv/main.tex to match figure/table structure from NHB2026/sections/ version

summary: Updated arxiv/main.tex to match the figure/table structure from NHB2026/sections/ version. All 11 requested changes applied: (1) Added Table 1 macrothemes with reference, (2) Updated Figure 1 caption, (3) Added Figure 2 macrotheme distributions with reference, (4) Renumbered salience figure to figure_3 with updated caption/label/references, (5) Added Methods S1 workflow figure, (6) Fixed S1 consensus filename, (7) Replaced S2 semantic map, (8) Fixed S3 pathway filename, (9) Added S4 heatmap, (10) Updated header to Nature Machine Intelligence, (11) Added Table S bold prefixes to all supplementary tables. Also restructured supplementary section order to match sections version (Methods before Results).

context.reasoning_summary: Read the arxiv main.tex to understand its current structure before making figure/table changes

annotation.content: Successfully synced arxiv/main.tex to match NHB2026/sections/ figure/table structure. Key changes: added Table 1 (macrothemes), added Figure 2 (macrotheme distributions), renumbered figure_2 to figure_3 for salience ratios, restructured supplementary section order (Methods before Results), added Methods S1 workflow figure, updated all figure filenames to proper S1/S2/S3/S4 naming convention, added Figure S4 heatmap, added bold Table S prefixes, updated header to Nature Machine Intelligence.

contribution.description: Synced arxiv/main.tex figure/table structure to match NHB2026 sections
